review.description: Performs standard architectural and quality code reviews based on customized project rules.
review.instructions: Refer to the guidelines defined in .opencode/agent/review.md. Focus on logic soundness, type safety, performance, and best practices.

architect.description: Guides system design and architectural changes for Antigravity 2.0 components.
architect.instructions: Refer to the guidelines defined in .opencode/agent/architect.md. Prioritize clean boundaries, testability, and robust abstractions.
